title: Man murdered in Asla Park identified
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The body of a man who was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The body of a man who was discovered by pedestrians in Notinana Street in Asla Park, Mossel Bay, on Sunday, 25 February has been identified as Johannes Plaatjies (38).","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The body of a man who was discovered by pedestrians in Notinana Street in Asla Park, Mossel Bay, on Sunday, 25 February has been identified as Johannes Plaatjies (38)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Police spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp told the Mossel Bay Advertiser that police were called to the scene at about 00:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp said the body had multiple stab wounds.","html":"Kapp said the body had multiple stab wounds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Police are investigating a case of murder and no one has been arrested yet.","html":"Police are investigating a case of murder and no one has been arrested yet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man murdered in Asla Park identified
